test_game2.introduction: A fuller temporary game package for testing manifest fields, images, save data, best score, actions, timers and rendering.
test_game2.author: TUI GAME
test_game2.description: Move the player, collect stars, save state, and verify richer host integration.
test_game2.detail: This package uses localized package fields, image-based icon/banner paths, save_game, save_best_score, get_key, timer APIs, drawing APIs, measurement APIs, random APIs, debug APIs and system request APIs. Upload images to assets/images/icon.png and assets/images/banner.png to test image rendering.
test_game2.title: ADVANCED TEST GAME
test_game2.subtitle: Collect stars and verify APIs.
